title: Trading System Overview
content:
The Qullamaggie trading methodology focuses on momentum swing trading. Key principles include:

1. Only trade liquid stocks with $60M+ daily volume
2. Wait for clean daily chart structures
3. Execute mechanically with strict risk control
4. Risk maximum 1% per trade

#trading #methodology
